billingSettings.findYourAgentKeyAt: Find your agent key at: Settings > API in your Szamlazz.hu account
billingSettings.findYourApiKeyAt: Find your API key at: Settings > API in your Billingo account
billingSettings.hasapikeyEnterNewKeyTo: hasApiKey ? 'Enter new key to replace...' : 'Paste your Billingo API key...'
billingSettings.hasszamlazzkeyEnterNewKeyTo: hasSzamlazzKey ? 'Enter new key to replace...' : 'Paste your Szamlazz.hu agent key...'
billingSettings.usedForInvoiceGenerationWhen: Used for invoice generation when pushing to the billing provider.

settingsView.aiFeaturesUseOpenaisGpt: AI features use OpenAI's GPT models to summarize emails, rewrite text, and generate draft replies. Your API key is stored securely encrypted on the server and never exposed to the browser. Usage charges apply based on your OpenAI account.
settingsView.appearWhenTheAppIs: appear when the app is open in your browser tab.
settingsView.automaticallyReplyToIncomingEmails: Automatically reply to incoming emails while you're away
settingsView.cacheIsDisabledForDebugging: Cache is disabled for debugging. Folders will load slower but always show fresh data from server. Re-enable after testing.
settingsView.cachedEmailSummariesToAvoid: - Cached email summaries to avoid re-processing. Expires after 24 hours.
settingsView.clickTheToggleAboveTo: Click the toggle above to enable push notifications. You'll be asked for permission.
settingsView.couldNotEnablePushNotifications: Could not enable push notifications. Make sure you\
settingsView.fastestForRepeatViewsStores: - Fastest for repeat views. Stores full message content locally. Takes priority over Redis for instant loading.
settingsView.fileTooLargeMaximumSize: File too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
settingsView.forceReadableColorsInEmail: Force readable colors in email content (ignores sender's styling)
settingsView.getDesktopAlertsForRead: Get desktop alerts for read receipts and calendar events
settingsView.getNotifiedBeforeCalendarEvents: Get notified before calendar events start
settingsView.getNotifiedWhenSomeoneOpens: Get notified when someone opens your tracked email
settingsView.hideImagesFromUntrustedSenders: Hide images from untrusted senders for privacy
settingsView.howLongBeforeTheApp: How long before the app locks
settingsView.howOftenToCheckFor: How often to check for new emails in the background
settingsView.iAmCurrentlyOutOf: I am currently out of the office and will return on...
settingsView.instantAccessForCurrentlyOpen: - Instant access for currently open emails. Cleared on page refresh.
settingsView.invalidFileTypePleaseUse: Invalid file type. Please use JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP.
settingsView.jpegPngGifOrWebp: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 5 MB. Will be resized to 512x512.
settingsView.lockAfterLeavingTheApp: Lock after leaving the app for a while
settingsView.logOutWhenInactiveFor: Log out when inactive for too long
settingsView.lowRedisMessageCountIs: Low Redis message count is normal if browser cache has data. Redis is most useful on new devices or after clearing browser cache.
settingsView.markMessagesAsReadWhen: Mark messages as read when opened
settingsView.passwordMustBeAtLeast: Password must be at least 8 characters
settingsView.permissionDeniedGoToYour: Permission denied. Go to your browser/device notification settings to re-enable.
settingsView.permissionDeniedPleaseEnableNotification: Permission denied. Please enable notifications in your browser/device settings.
settingsView.playASoundWhenNotifications: Play a sound when notifications arrive
settingsView.pleaseFillInAllPassword: Please fill in all password fields
settingsView.pleaseSelectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one Google calendar and a local calendar
settingsView.popupWasBlockedPleaseAllow: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
settingsView.pushNotificationsAreActiveYoull: Push notifications are active. You'll receive alerts for new emails and chat messages.
settingsView.pushNotificationsAreNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
settingsView.pwaWorkEvenWhenThe: (PWA) work even when the app is closed — perfect for mobile devices. New emails and chat messages will trigger a notification on your phone or computer.
settingsView.getNotifiedWhenNewEmail: Show a desktop notification when new mail arrives in your inbox
settingsView.getNotifiedWhenNewChat: Show a desktop notification when a new chat message arrives (muted chats are skipped)
settingsView.receiveNotificationsOnYourPhonedesktop: Receive notifications on your phone/desktop even when the app is closed
settingsView.redisServerIsNotAvailable: Redis server is not available. The app will work but with reduced performance.
settingsView.setAPinFirstTo: Set a PIN first to enable biometric
settingsView.sharedCacheAcrossAllYour: - Shared cache across all your devices. Stores folder status (2min TTL), messages (1hr TTL), and thumbnails (24hr TTL). Helps when browser cache is empty.
settingsView.showDetailedConsoleLogsFor: Show detailed console logs for debugging (requires page refresh)
settingsView.showNotificationsInYourSystem: Show notifications in your system tray (Windows) or notification center (Mac)
settingsView.someFixesRequireSudoRun: Some fixes require sudo. Run these commands on the server:
settingsView.uploadToDriveIfLarger: Upload to Drive if larger than 25 MB
settingsView.yourBrowserHasBlockedNotifications: Your browser has blocked notifications. Please click the lock icon in your address bar and allow notifications.
settingsView.someFixesRequireSudo: Some fixes require sudo. Run these commands on the server:
settingsView.debugLogsEnabled: Debug logs enabled - refresh page to see debug panels
settingsView.permissionDeniedBrowser: Permission denied. Please enable notifications in your browser settings.
settingsView.pushNotifEnabled: Push notifications enabled! You'll receive alerts even when the app is closed.
settingsView.permissionDeniedDevice: Permission denied. Please enable notifications in your browser/device settings.
settingsView.couldNotEnablePush: Could not enable push notifications. Make sure you're using HTTPS.
settingsView.pleaseFillAllPasswordFields: Please fill in all password fields
settingsView.ambientBackgroundDesc: Add subtle accent-colored glow behind all screens
settingsView.addOpenaiApiKey: Add your OpenAI API key to enable AI features
settingsView.aiModelDescription: GPT-5 Nano is the cheapest option. Higher models provide better quality but cost more.
settingsView.aiPrivacyWarning: By enabling AI features, your email content will be sent to {provider} (a third-party provider) for processing. This means you will no longer have 100% privacy over your messages. {provider} may process and temporarily store your data according to their {link}.
settingsView.apiKeySecurelyStored: Your OpenAI API key is securely stored
settingsView.appLockDescription: Require a PIN or biometric (Face ID / fingerprint) to unlock the app after being away. Your session stays active — this is a quick-unlock, not a logout.
settingsView.autoLogoutDescription: Automatically log out after a period of inactivity to protect your account.
settingsView.autoReplyDescription: This message will be sent automatically in response to incoming emails during the scheduled period.
settingsView.biometricRegisteredAlt: Biometric is registered as alternative to PIN
settingsView.cacheDescription: The app uses local storage to cache emails, AI summaries, and other data for faster access. Clear caches if you experience issues or want to free up storage.
settingsView.cacheDisabledDesc: Cache is disabled - always fetch fresh from server
settingsView.cacheEnabledDesc: Cache is enabled - folders load instantly
settingsView.cachingExplanationIntro: When you open an email, the system checks caches in order: Memory > Browser > Redis > IMAP Server
settingsView.clearAllCachesDescription: This will clear all cached messages, AI summaries, and board links. Settings and preferences will be preserved.
settingsView.customizePromptsDescription: Customize the prompts used for AI features. Leave empty to use defaults.
settingsView.dataFolderDescription: Check if the data folder has correct ownership and permissions for the web server.
settingsView.managedAccountNote: Your account is provisioned and managed by your organization's administrator. To create, suspend, or delete an account, please contact your administrator.
settingsView.enableDesktopNotifForCalendar: Enable desktop notifications first to use calendar reminders
settingsView.enableDesktopNotifForEmail: Enable desktop notifications first to use email alerts
settingsView.filesExceedingThisSize: Files exceeding this size will be automatically uploaded to Drive with a 7-day share link instead of being attached directly
settingsView.gpt5IgnoresTemperature: Note: GPT-5 models ignore this setting (only support temperature=1)
settingsView.ifAutoFixDoesntWork: If auto-fix doesn't work, run these commands on your server:
settingsView.iosHomescreenInstruction: On iPhone, push notifications require the app to be installed to your Home Screen.
settingsView.iosInstallInstructions: Push notifications on iOS require iOS 16.4+ and the app must be installed as a PWA.
settingsView.leaveEmptyToStart: Leave empty to start immediately and run indefinitely until manually disabled.
settingsView.notificationsBlockedBrowser: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
settingsView.onlyContentYouChoose: Only the content you explicitly choose to summarize or rewrite is sent to OpenAI.
settingsView.oooScheduleEnded: Schedule has ended - disable to stop showing this message
settingsView.pinMustBeAtLeast4: PIN must be at least 4 digits
settingsView.removeAccountConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove {email}? This will also remove all calendar syncs for this account.
settingsView.setPinDescription: Set a 4-8 digit PIN to enable app lock
settingsView.signatureDescription: Create your email signature with rich formatting. You can add bold, italic, links, and images. Paste images directly or click the image button to upload.
settingsView.signatureTip: Tip: Your signature will be automatically added to new emails, replies, and forwards.
settingsView.storageConfigManagedByAdmin: Storage configuration is managed at the server level via the admin panel. Contact your administrator if storage settings need to be changed.
settingsView.temperatureDescription: Lower = more focused, Higher = more creative (0-2)
settingsView.uploadToDriveIfLargerThan10: Upload to Drive if larger than 10 MB
settingsView.uploadToDriveIfLargerThan15: Upload to Drive if larger than 15 MB
settingsView.uploadToDriveIfLargerThan20: Upload to Drive if larger than 20 MB
settingsView.uploadToDriveIfLargerThan5: Upload to Drive if larger than 5 MB
settingsView.useBiometricDescription: Use biometric as a quick alternative to entering PIN
settingsView.useOriginalSubject: Use {placeholder} to include the original email subject.
settingsView.usedForRewritingAndDraft: Used for text rewriting and draft replies
settingsView.clearAiSummariesMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all AI summaries? Summaries will be regenerated when you view emails again.
settingsView.clearAllCachesConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear ALL caches? This will remove all cached messages, AI summaries, and board links. Settings and preferences will be preserved.
settingsView.testNotificationBody: This is a test notification from your email app
settingsView.undoSendDesc: Delay sending so you can undo right after clicking Send.
settingsView.autoAddMentionsDesc: When you {'@'}mention someone in the body, also add them to the To field.
settingsView.notifyOnMentionDesc: Get an in-app notification when someone {'@'}-mentions you in an email.
